notes: an AP2 payment receipt is the post-settlement final state of an agent payment: a Success or Error status, the issuer (PSP or credentials provider), and on success the psp_confirmation_id and network_confirmation_id that evidence the settled transaction

unlike an x402 settlement or an ACP checkout, an AP2 receipt carries reference: a hash of the closed mandate that authorized the payment, a genuine back-link to what authorized the spend, lifted here to advisory.mandateRef

the receipt is issued as an ES256 SD-JWT-VC, so its signature and alg live in the JWT envelope, not in these decoded claims; a data-only mapping cannot promote a signature it does not carry, so alg and signature are reported missing and the mandate binding stays advisory rather than a proven back-link

the honest upgrade is a signature-verifying profile that validates the SD-JWT and checks reference against the issuer's closed mandate, promoting reference to a SEP-2828 back-link and asserting the receipt signature; that is a computed crypto step, deliberately out of scope for a declarative profile
